acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

borrowTokenFromCollateral(address,addres.details: Creates a collateralized debt position      input/output: =>, swap: ->      swapFtPath ft -> debt token => recipient

params.maxDebtAmt: Maximum amount of debt to incur
params.recipient: Address to receive the borrowed tokens
params.swapFtPath: SwapPath for swapping FT token to debt token

returns._0: ID of the generated GT token

params.isV1: Indicates if the borrow is for market V1 or V2
params.recipient: Address to receive the borrowed tokens

returns._0: ID of the generated GT token

flashRepayFromColl(address,address,uint2.details: Repays debt and closes a position      input/output: =>, swap: ->      swapPath: collateral -> debt token (-> exact ft token. optional) => router

params.byDebtToken: True if repaying with debt token, false if using FT token
params.callbackData: The data for callback, abi.encode(FlashRepayOptions.FLASH_REPAY, abi.encode(swapPath))
params.expectedOutput: The expect debt token ouput amount after flashrepay
params.gtId: ID of the GT token to repay debt from
params.market: The market to repay debt in
params.recipient: Address to receive any remaining collateral

flashRepayToGetCollateral(address,addres.details: Repays debt and closes a position      input/output: =>, swap: ->      swapPath: partial collateral -> (exact or not)debt token => router

params.callbackData: The data for callback, abi.encode(FlashRepayOptions.FLASH_REPAY, abi.encode(swapPath))
params.expectedOutput: The expect collateral token ouput amount after flashrepay
params.gtId: ID of the GT token to repay
params.market: The market to repay debt in
params.recipient: Address to receive any remaining collateral

leverage(address,address,uint128,bool,(u.details: Creates a leveraged position in the specified market      input/output: =>, swap: ->      case1 by debt token: path0 (=> debt token or => token -> debt token) => router      case2 by collateral token: path0 (=> collateral token or => token -> collateral token) => router      optional path1: XT token => router (if you want to use existing XT)      swapXtPath XT token(optional) debt token -> xt token => router      swapCollateralPath debt token -> collateral token => router

params.inputPaths: Array of SwapPath structs defining the input token paths
params.isV1: Indicates if the leverage is for market V1 or V2
params.maxLtv: Maximum loan-to-value ratio for the leverage
params.recipient: Address to receive the leveraged position

returns.gtId: ID of the generated GT token
returns.netXtOut: Actual amount of XT tokens input after swapping

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

rolloverGt(address,uint256,address,uint2.details: This function allows users to rollover their GT position to a new market or third-protocol

params.additionalAsset: The additional asset(debt token, old collateral token, new collateral token) to reduce the LTV
params.gtId: The ID of the GT token being rolled over
params.rolloverData: Additional data for the rollover operation rollover to TermMax: abi.encode(FlashRepayOptions.ROLLOVER, abi.encode(recipient, nextMarket, maxLtv, collateralPath, debtTokenPath))  - collateralPaths: old collateral -> new collateral => router  - debtTokenPaths: ft -> debt token => router rollover to Aave: abi.encode(FlashRepayOptions.ROLLOVER_AAVE, abi.encode(recipient, oldCollateral, aave, interestRateMode, referralCode, collateralPath)) rollover to Morpho: abi.encode(FlashRepayOptions.ROLLOVER_MORPHO, abi.encode(recipient, oldCollateral, morpho, marketId, collateralPath))

returns.newGtId: The ID of the newly created GT token in the next market, newGtId is zero if rollover to Aave or Morpho

swapAndRepay(address,uint256,uint128,boo.details: This function allows users to swap tokens and repay debt in a GearingToken positioninput/output: =>, swap: ->      path 0: => any token -> debt token/ft token => router      path 1(optional): remaining debt token => recipient

params.byDebtToken: Indicates if the repayment is by debt token
params.gtId: The ID of the GearingToken position to repay
params.paths: The SwapPath struct defining the swap operations

returns.netOutOrIns: The net amounts of tokens received or cost when swapping

swapTokens((uint256,address,bool,(addres.details: Uses the SwapPath struct to define the swap path

params.paths: Array of SwapPath structs defining the swap operations

returns._0: Array of amounts received for each swap operation

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner. Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

borrowTokenFromCollateralAndXt(address,a.notice: Borrows tokens using collateral and XT

flashRepayToGetCollateral(address,addres.notice: Repays debt from collateral and receives remaining collateral

swapAndRepay(address,uint256,uint128,boo.notice: Swaps tokens and repays debt in a GearingToken position

swapTokens((uint256,address,bool,(addres.notice: Swaps tokens using a predefined path
